Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Let's now discuss other methods of searching a large ocean area. As we are playing as the Soviets, we have access to an Okean-class spy trawler.

The Okean class trawlers are East German-built oceangoing trawlers which are employed by the Soviets in intelligence gathering missions worldwide. These trawlers have incredible endurance and are a common sight shadowing NATO battle groups during the Cold War.
Let's click on our Okean-class trawler and examine it now.
